title: Kevin McCallister Creeper
description: When a Creeper primes, you'll hear "Hello!" instead of a hiss.
body:
Have you ever wanted a different sound for when a Creeper is about to explode? What if it sounded more friendly (but definitely not any less deadly)?

Applying this resource pack will change the sound of a Creeper getting ready to explode to Kevin McCallister saying "Hello!" to Marv in the first Home Alone movie. TNT uses the same default sound, but is unaffected by it. Subtitles are also changed to "Creeper says hello!"
